name: IRONSCALES AI Email Agents
description: Purpose-built AI agents for email security including Red Teaming Agent, Phishing SOC Agent, and Phishing Simulation Agent. Native API integration with Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace for in-inbox deployment without infrastructure changes.
capabilities: Continuous reconnaissance and attack simulation (Red Teaming Agent)
Rapid forensic investigation of suspicious emails (Phishing SOC Agent)
Hyper-personalized phishing simulations based on OSINT (Phishing Simulation Agent)
notes: Winter 2026 release announced in March 2026. Three purpose-built agents for email security. Deployment requires only admin-level API access, no MX record changes. Shift from reactive to preemptive email security.
